blocks.text: Hovland lifted after a rough opening round but sits T39 at -1 — five shots off leader Sungjae Im. No Norwegians threatening at Copperhead. The weekend is about salvaging, not storming the leaderboard.

blocks.label: ⚽ Sunday's Big Ones
items: ⚽ Sun 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle United — Tyne-Wear Derby, always unpredictable
⚽ Sun 14:00 — Rayo Vallecano vs Barcelona — La Liga title push at Camp Nou
